entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in Xince and Xodel successful, version 1.0. - xodel

[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/documentation) (en-US) The value of RSU vestings during the period, net of the adjustment to stockholders’ equity associated with an employee’s minimum statutory income tax withholding obligation as part of a net-share settlement. -

[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/documentation) (en-US) Tabular disclosure of segment assets for each reportable segment. -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Sublimit for the Issuance of Letters of Credit -

[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Change in Increments in Applicable Margin -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/documentation) (en-US) The increment amount by which the applicable interest rate margin will increase/decrease depending on the total leverage ratio. -

[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/documentation) (en-US) Total assets, excluding receivables, inventory, and property and equipment, identified as items not allocated to segments. These assets are used to reconcile the total of reportable segments' assets to the consolidated amount. -

[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/documentation) (en-US) Recycled products originally produced by the original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) or used products that have been remanufactured. -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/documentation) (en-US) Standard Service Warranty Period - Describes the duration term of the service warranty. -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Other comprehensive income from unconsolidated subsidiaries -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Proceeds from issuance of debt, net of discount and debt issuance costs -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/documentation) (en-US) Proceeds from issuance of debt, net of discount and debt issuance costs -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Proceeds from issuance of debt, net of discount and debt issuance costs -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Net income attributable to LKQ stockholders -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/totalLabel) (en-US) Net income attributable to LKQ stockholders -

[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/documentation) (en-US) Amount charged against earnings in the period for incurred and estimated costs associated with exit from or disposal of business activities or restructurings pursuant to a duly authorized plan, excluding asset retirement obligations. Additionally, this element represents acquisition-related costs incurred to effect a business combination which costs have been expensed during the period. Such costs include finder's fees; advisory, legal, accounting, valuation, and other professional or consulting fees; general administrative costs, including the costs of maintaining an internal acquisitions department; and may include costs of registering and issuing debt and equity securities. -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Restructuring Charges And Business Combination Acquisition Related Costs -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Less: net income attributable to continuing noncontrolling interest -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Net Income Attributable to Continuing Noncontrolling Interest Per Share, Diluted -

[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Restructuring Cumulative Plan Costs [Table Text Block] -

[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/documentation) (en-US) Disclosure of accounting policy for standard warranties including the methodology for measuring the liability. In addition, disclosure of accounting policy for extended product warranties and other guarantee contracts including the methodology for measuring the liability. -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/documentation) (en-US) Borrowings Under Amendment No. 3 to the Fourth Amended and Restated Credit Agreement including both term loan and revolving credit -

[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Reconciliation of Segment Earnings Before Interest Taxes Depreciation And Amortization to Net Income Table [Table] -

[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/documentation) (en-US) Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Equity Instruments Other than Options, Expected To Vest, Number -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Equity Instruments Other than Options, Expected To Vest, Number -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Share-based Compensation Arrangement by Share-based Payment Award, Equity Instruments Other than Options, Expected To Vest, Number -

[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/documentation) (en-US) Segment EBITDA includes revenue and expenses that are controllable by the segment. Corporate and administrative expenses are allocated to the segments based on usage, with shared expenses apportioned based on the segment's percentage of consolidated revenue. Segment EBITDA excludes restructuring and acquisition related expenses, depreciation, amortization, interest, change in fair value of contingent consideration liabilities, taxes and equity in earnings of unconsolidated subsidiaries. Loss on debt extinguishment is considered a component of interest in calculating EBITDA, as the write-off of debt issuance costs is similar to the treatment of debt issuance cost amortization. -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Earnings Before Interest Taxes Depreciation And Amortization -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/documentation) (en-US) This element represents the earnings before interest, taxes, and depreciation and amortization (EBITDA) from continuing operations. -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/label) (en-US) Increase (decrease) in cash classified within current assets held for sale -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/terseLabel) (en-US) Less: increase in cash classified within current assets held for sale -
[labels] (http://www.xbrl.org/2003/role/documentation) (en-US) Increase (decrease) in cash classified within current assets held for sale -
